title: What a Godly Man Does in the Waiting
caption:
The man desperately chasing a wife reeks of it — and she can tell.

The waiting season isn't dead time. It's the season God actually uses to build something.

Stop performing for a future wife. Build the man God's building anyway. Do the hard work no one assigned you. Chase the kingdom first — and trust that the right order produces the right results.

"Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4

Save this and send it to a brother who needs to hear it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #singleness #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #christianity #scripture #discipleship
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
